heading: Statistical agencies
label: 3563 Statistical agencies
notes: Effective DateSection effective 180 days after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2019 Amendment note under , Government Organization and Employees.Jan. 14, 2019section 403 of Pub. L. 115–435section 306 of Title 5
amendments: Effective DateSection effective 180 days after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2019 Amendment note under , Government Organization and Employees.Jan. 14, 2019section 403 of Pub. L. 115–435section 306 of Title 5

children.label: A
children.text: produce and disseminate relevant and timely statistical information;

children.label: B
children.text: conduct credible and accurate statistical activities;

children.label: D
children.text: protect the trust of information providers by ensuring the confidentiality and exclusive statistical use of their responses.

children.heading: .—Policies, best practices, and procedures
children.label: 2 .—Policies, best practices, and procedures
children.text: Each statistical agency or unit shall adopt policies, best practices, and appropriate procedures to implement the responsibilities described in paragraph (1).

children.heading: .—Support From Other Agencies
children.label: b .—Support From Other Agencies
children.text: The head of each agency shall enable, support, and facilitate statistical agencies or units in carrying out the responsibilities described in subsection (a)(1).

children.heading: .—Regulations
children.label: c .—Regulations
children.text: The Director shall prescribe regulations to carry out this section.

children.heading: .—Accurate
children.label: 1 .—Accurate
children.text: The term “accurate”, when used with respect to statistical activities, means statistics that consistently match the events and trends being measured.

children.heading: .—Confidentiality
children.label: 2 .—Confidentiality
children.text: The term “confidentiality” means a quality or condition accorded to information as an obligation not to disclose that information to an unauthorized party.

children.heading: .—Objective
children.label: 3 .—Objective
children.text: The term “objective”, when used with respect to statistical activities, means accurate, clear, complete, and unbiased.

children.heading: .—Relevant
children.label: 4 .—Relevant
children.text: The term “relevant”, when used with respect to statistical information, means processes, activities, and other such matters likely to be useful to policymakers and public and private sector data users.
